name: Demon Slayer
required_items: bucket of water (can be obtained during the quest)
25 bones (can't be noted, but can be delivered in increments)

name: Romeo & Juliet
required_items: cadava berries (can be obtained during quest)

name: Sheep Shearer
required_items: shears to obtain wool to spin into balls of wool (obtained during the quest)

name: Shield of Arrav
required_items: black arm gang: 2 phoenix crossbows (obtained during the quest)

name: Ernest the Chicken
required_items: spade (can be obtained during the quest)
fish food (can be obtained during the quest)
poison (can be obtained during the quest)

name: Vampyre Slayer
required_items: hammer (can be bought from the general store just north of the blue moon inn for 1 coin)
beer (can be bought during the quest for 2 coins)
garlic (can be obtained during the quest)
stake (obtained from dr harlow after giving him a beer)

name: Prince Ali Rescue
required_items: yellow dye or 2 onions and 5 coins
bucket of water or jug of water (obtainable during quest)
rope (can be bought during the quest at ned for 18 coins or 4 balls of wool)

name: Black Knights' Fortress
required_items: cabbage (can be obtained from the cabbage patch in edgeville monastery and lumbridge cellar. cabbages obtained from draynor manor cannot be used)
iron chainbody (can be purchased at horvik's armour shop in varrock and from wayne's chains in falador)
bronze med helm (can be purchased in the helmet shop in barbarian village, spawns by the backdoor of draynor manor)

name: Witch's Potion
required_items: rat's tail (only obtainable after starting the quest)

name: The Knight's Sword
required_items: redberry pie (not half a redberry pie), (members can purchase one from romily weaklax in the cooking guild)
any pickaxe (one spawns in south falador)
2 iron bars (4 if you want your own blurite sword) (one spawns west of the graveyard of shadows in the wilderness)
blurite ore (2 if you want your own blurite sword; it can be obtained during the quest (plus 1 additional ore if doing falador easy diary (members only)))

name: Goblin Diplomacy
required_items: 3 goblin mail (obtained during the quest, all can be found in goblin village)
1 blue dye (or 2 woad leaves and 5 coins to obtain a blue dye from aggie; offer 20 coins to wyson the gardener and he will give you two woad leaves)

1 orange dye – created by combining red dye with yellow dye
1 red dye (or 3 redberries and 5 coins to obtain a red dye from aggie)
1 yellow dye (2 onion and 5 coins to obtain a yellow dye from aggie)
1 red dye (or 3 redberries and 5 coins to obtain a red dye from aggie)
1 yellow dye (2 onion and 5 coins to obtain a yellow dye from aggie)

name: Pirate's Treasure
required_items: karamjan rum (obtainable during the quest for 30 coins)
white apron (obtainable during the quest in port sarim at gerrant's fishy business.)
60 coins (only 30 is needed if using a ring of charos(a))

name: Dragon Slayer I
required_items: unfired bowl (can be made with soft clay on a potter's wheel with 8 crafting)
wizard's mind bomb (can be bought in the rising sun inn in falador or the toad and chicken in burthorpe)
lobster pot (can be bought from any fishing shop)
silk (can be bought from thessalia for 30 coins or the al kharid silk stall for 3 coins -- members can steal it from the ardougne silk stall with 20 thieving)
magic/ranged weapon as well as a law and air rune (to cast telekinetic grab if your magic level is 33 or higher) or 10,000 coins
anti-dragon shield (can be obtained during the quest)
90 steel nails (members can buy these from the sawmill operator north-east of varrock, they can also be smithed at 34 smithing using 6 steel bars by all players)

3 planks (only normal planks)
free-to-play: pick up the spawns in the graveyard of shadows, level 19 wilderness, or for a safer option, ornate lockboxes in the camdozaal vault after below ice mountain
member: several other spawn locations or buy them at the sawmill
free-to-play: pick up the spawns in the graveyard of shadows, level 19 wilderness, or for a safer option, ornate lockboxes in the camdozaal vault after below ice mountain
member: several other spawn locations or buy them at the sawmill

name: Below Ice Mountain
required_items: cooked meat (can be obtained during the quest)

beer (can be obtained during the quest)
alternatively asgarnian ale, dwarven stout, or a wizard's mind bomb
alternatively asgarnian ale, dwarven stout, or a wizard's mind bomb

name: Lost City
required_items: woodcutting axe (you will need to bank the axe before accessing entrana -- you cannot use a blessed axe)

name: Witch's House
required_items: cheese (you may wish to bring several in case you mess up)

name: Merlin's Crystal
required_items: bucket of wax (obtainable during the quest with insect repellent, a bucket spawns near the beekeeper)

name: Heroes' Quest
required_items: ice gloves (obtainable during the quest) or smiths gloves (i)
dusty key (obtainable during the quest; if travelling to taverley dungeon for the lava eel, without 70 agility) or a knife or slash weapon (if travelling to the lava maze for the lava eel)
harralander potion (unf) (or a harralander and a vial of water)
some form of ranged or magic attack method (if using a toxic blowpipe make sure it is set to longrange)

name: Scorpion Catcher
required_items: dusty key (unless you have 70 agility (boostable), can be obtained during the quest)

name: Family Crest
required_items: any poison cure like antipoison (you will lose this item)
means to cast all 4 blast spells

name: Fishing Contest
required_items: 5 coins (10 if you buy a fishing rod from jack)
fishing rod (obtainable during quest), oily fishing rod does not work

name: Monk's Friend
required_items: regular logs or a regular plank

name: Temple of Ikov
required_items: any yew, magic, or dark bow (must be able to fire ice arrows, so crossbows won't work!) or darts or throwing knives

name: Clock Tower
required_items: bucket of water (obtainable during quest) or ice gloves or smiths gloves (i)

name: Tree Gnome Village
required_items: 6 normal logs (or an axe, obtainable during the quest by killing goblins in the tree gnome village maze)

name: Plague City
required_items: dwellberries (spawns in mcgrubor's wood, squeeze through the loose railing, use als, or telekinetic grab them. they can be bought from heckel funch or hudo in the tree gnome stronghold or grown with 36 farming.)
rope (purchasable in the east ardougne general store, port khazard general store, ned, or a spawn in karamja general store.)
4 buckets of water (can be used one-by-one, there is a water source and bucket spawn near edmond)
bucket of milk (obtained by using a bucket on a dairy cow, one is north of ardougne, or bought from hudo or heckel funch.)
chocolate dust (made using a pestle and mortar or knife on a chocolate bar, which can be bought from the ardougne baker's stall., hudo, heckel funch or wydin's food store)
snape grass (spawns west of the crafting guild or the peninsula north-east of hosidius. it can be grown at 61 farming. can also be obtained from killing tribesmen in karamja.)
picture of elena (inside alrena and edmond's house)

name: Sea Slug
required_items: swamp paste (made by mixing flour with swamp tar then cooking the mixture on a fire; can also be bought from a trader crewmember for 75 coins, from rasolo for 60 coins west of the fishing guild, or from the khazard general store for 42 coins at full stock)

name: Biohazard
required_items: bird feed (can be obtained during the quest. found in a cupboard in jerico's house)
bird cages (can be obtained during the quest. found behind jerico's house)
priest gown top and bottom (can be obtained during the quest for a total of 12 coins from asyff's fancy clothes store)
gas mask (can be obtained for free from the cupboard in edmond and alrena's house in east ardougne)

name: The Grand Tree
required_items: 1,000 coins, unless you have helped femi or completed tree gnome village and plan to use spirit trees.

name: Shilo Village
required_items: a lit torch or candle (lanterns or black candles don't work) (a bruma torch will work, but you will not get this item back)
bronze wire (can be made from scratch using the general store and anvil north of tai bwo wannai)
3 regular bones (obtainable during quest, only normal bones work; a spare is a good idea in case you bury one)

name: Underground Pass
required_items: 1-5 arrows (only non-poisoned arrows with metal arrowtips will work. craw's bow does not work. crossbows and bolts will not work. broad arrows, ogre arrows, and ice arrows will also not work.)

name: The Tourist Trap
required_items: full desert clothing (shirt, robe and boots required). you will lose them. (desert robes, black desert robe, and black desert shirt does not work)
1-3 bronze bars (can be lost while experimenting)
means to enter the desert. (such as the shantay pass, desert amulet 2, teleport tablet or scrolls, fairy rings or the pharaoh's sceptre)

name: Watchtower
required_items: death rune (can be obtained during the quest)
2 ropes (2nd rope can be obtained during the quest)
guam potion (unf) or guam leaf and a vial of water (vial of water can be obtained during quest)
any light source (can be obtained during the quest)
skavid map (can be obtained during the quest)
pestle and mortar (can be obtained during the quest)
bat bones (can be obtained during the quest, a knife or slash weapon is needed, grinding the bat bones before starting the quest to leave the 'mortar in the bank is also an option)
jangerberries (can be obtained during the quest)

name: The Dig Site
required_items: leather gloves (can be stolen from a digsite workman)
cup of tea (can be stolen from the varrock tea stall)
2 ropes (can be stolen from a digsite workman, but with average luck, this can easily take more than 15 minutes.)
opal or uncut opal (small chance to acquire while panning for a quest item)
charcoal (obtainable during the quest, but may take some time)

name: Gertrude's Cat
required_items:
seasoned sardine (bought from the grand exchange) or alternatively:
raw sardine (caught or bought from gerrant's fishy business.)
doogle leaves (south of gertrude's house)
raw sardine (caught or bought from gerrant's fishy business.)

name: Legends' Quest
required_items: any machete (can be obtained during the quest - a regular one can be found by searching the cupboards next to radimus erkle)
2 gold bars (6 in case you fail or want more gold bowls)

one of each cut gem up to diamond:
sapphire
emerald
ruby
diamond
opal
jade
red topaz
unpowered orb and runes to cast any charge orb once (requires the standard spellbook equipped - two casts are needed if taking the "long path" during the second fight with the demon)
charcoal (2-3 in case it breaks -- obtainable during the quest if travelling via shilo village)
3 papyrus (4-5 in case one is torn -- obtainable during the quest if travelling via shilo village or from the spawn on radimus's desk)

name: Big Chompy Bird Hunting
required_items: any axe that you can use (blessed axe does not work)
feathers (100 to be safe; coloured feathers from hunter work)
4 wolf bones (can be obtained from level 64 wolves during the quest or from level 14 wolves in the stronghold of security)
cabbage (can be obtained during the quest, draynor cabbage will not work)
tomato (can be obtained during the quest)
onion (can be obtained during the quest)
potato (can be obtained during the quest)
equa leaves (can be obtained during the quest)
doogle leaves (can be obtained during the quest)

name: Elemental Workshop I
required_items: knife or a non-poisoned slash weapon (e.g. dagger or scimitar)
4 coal (4 more for each additional bar you would like to produce)

name: Priest in Peril
required_items: 50 unnoted rune essence or pure essence (can be mined by talking to aubury in varrock, after completing rune mysteries. all 50 essence does not have to be of the same type.)
bucket (spawns above the castle's kitchen in the north-easternmost room (go to the kitchen, and climb up the stairs))

name: Nature Spirit
required_items: silver sickle - either purchase it from the grand exchange, or make it with a silver bar and sickle mould in a furnace. ironmen can buy a silver bar from the silver merchant in ardougne.

name: Death Plateau
required_items: 60 coins (bring more for the gambling dice with harold part)
asgarnian ale (can be found on the bar at the pub in burthorpe)

name: Troll Stronghold
required_items: climbing boots or 12 coins to buy them

name: Tai Bwo Wannai Trio
required_items: knife or bladed weapon, such as a sword
sliced banana (can be obtained during the quest)
pestle and mortar (can be obtained during the quest for 6 gp)
iron spear or better. do not work: black spear, leaf-bladed spear, and bone spear. (the spear will be lost as well.)
ranged or magic equipment to kill a monkey for a monkey corpse
tinderbox (if you wish to avoid running back to the range in brimhaven)
jogre bones (can be obtained during the quest)
seaweed (can be obtained during the quest)
karamjan rum or 30 coins to purchase (if obtaining the rum before starting, add the sliced banana or the rum will disappear when you leave the island)

name: Regicide
required_items: 7 coal in the bank (although at least 25 is recommended, or you may bring the coal noted to save you a bank trip)
bow and some arrows (or lit fire arrows if you already have some.)
limestone (or a pickaxe and 10+ mining). note that limestone bricks will not work.
strip of cloth (made on a loom with 4 balls of wool; not a bolt of cloth - you can use the loom at the iorwerth camp or at the falador farm)
gloves, the list on quicklime shows all gloves that work.
cooked rabbit (obtainable during quest if you bring an axe) or roast rabbit
optional: your iban's staff or its upgraded counterpart in order to recharge it, if you have space available in your inventory.

name: Eadgar's Ruse
required_items: climbing boots (or 12 coins to buy from tenzing)
vodka (sold by heckel funch at the tree gnome stronghold bar)
pineapple chunks (pineapples are sold by heckel funch at the tree gnome stronghold bar or any charter ship, use a knife to dice the pineapple into chunks)
1 log (2-3 logs and a tinderbox may be helpful)
10 grain (obtainable during the quest, just south of tegid)
5 raw chicken (chickens on the way at tenzing's house)

name: Shades of Mort'ton
required_items: 5000+ coins (bring plenty of money just in case)
2 tarromin potion (unf) (made by adding 2 clean tarromins (obtainable during quest) to 2 vials of water (empty vials are obtainable during quest))
an axe for cutting pyre logs

prior to building the temple, you need a hammer (1 coin at the general store). however, a regular hammer is insufficient to build the temple without a large group. an additional 13,000 coins (or 5,515 on the grand exchange) allows you to buy a flamtaer hammer from razmire, which is necessary to complete this part of the quest without a group.

name: The Fremennik Trials
required_items: either a raw shark, raw manta ray, or raw sea turtle

if crafting the lyre yourself:
woodcutting axe
knife
potato (obtainable during quest)
onion (obtainable during quest)
cabbage (obtainable during quest)

name: Horror from the Deep
required_items: any sword or longsword that you are willing to lose (except rusty sword and prop sword)
any arrow (except ogre arrows and training arrows)
2 regular planks (can be obtained from barbarian outpost)
means to deal melee and ranged damage
means to deal damage with air, water, earth and fire spells

name: Throne of Miscellania
required_items: logs (obtainable during the quest if you bring an axe)
at least one of these tools in order to gain favour: a pickaxe, an axe (if 45 woodcutting), a rake (if 10 farming and 35 herblore, obtainable during quest for 15 gp), a harpoon or lobster pot
any non-silver ring you are willing to lose (not onyx/dragonstone/explorer/beacon/'perfect' ring)

flowers you are willing to lose (can be bought from flower girl in miscellania for 15 coins; trollweiss, marigold, nasturtiums, and white lily will not work. you can also plant and pick mithril seeds if you do not have flowers yet.)
if seeking the prince: a cake (chocolate cakes work too)
if seeking the princess: any bow (except composite, ogre, training and magic bows!) you are willing to lose

name: Monkey Madness I
required_items: monkey bones or corpse from karamja (obtainable during quest)

name: Haunted Mine
required_items: a chisel (can be acquired during the quest)

name: Troll Romance
required_items: climbing boots (not needed if using trollheim teleport)

wax (can be made ahead of time)
a bucket of wax (use insect repellent on a beehive followed by a bucket)
a cake tin
swamp tar
a bucket of wax (use insect repellent on a beehive followed by a bucket)

name: In Search of the Myreque
required_items: a druid pouch containing at least 5 charges
10 coins or a ring of charos (a)

name: Creature of Fenkenstrain
required_items: 1 law & 1 air rune for telekinetic grab or 50 coins

name: Roving Elves
required_items: glarial's pebble (can be obtained during the quest)
key (can be obtained during the quest)

name: Ghosts Ahoy
required_items:
some amount of ecto-tokens:
31 ecto-tokens (20 with ring of charos (a))
or 25 ecto-tokens (10 with ring) using charter ships
or 1 bone, 1 pot, and 1 bucket for every 5 ecto-tokens required (see pre-quest for more info)
or 25 ecto-tokens (10 with ring) using charter ships
or 1 bone, 1 pot, and 1 bucket for every 5 ecto-tokens required (see pre-quest for more info)
3 colours of dye (the dye colours you will need are random. if you want to save a trip, have 3 red, 3 blue, and 3 yellow dyes. that way, you can mix whatever colours you end up needing.)
knife (can be purchased from the canifis general store)
needle (can be purchased from the canifis general store)
thread (can be purchased from the canifis general store)
one extra bucket of slime for colouring the bed sheet (can be purchased from a charter ship crewmember at the port).

nettle tea (prepared ahead of time) or items to make nettle tea:
a tinderbox and a log of which you have the firemaking level to light. tinderbox can be purchased from the general store during quest
gloves (must be closed fingered - slayer gloves, ranger gloves, infinity gloves, moonclan gloves, granite gloves, and lunar gloves won't work)
nettles (can be obtained during the quest)
bowl of water (empty bowl can be purchased during quest -- the gold bowl won't work)
a tinderbox and a log of which you have the firemaking level to light. tinderbox can be purchased from the general store during quest
gloves (must be closed fingered - slayer gloves, ranger gloves, infinity gloves, moonclan gloves, granite gloves, and lunar gloves won't work)
nettles (can be obtained during the quest)
bowl of water (empty bowl can be purchased during quest -- the gold bowl won't work)

name: One Small Favour
required_items:
the ingredients required to make a guthix rest:
2 guam leaves
marrentill
harralander
bowl of hot water (obtainable during the quest)
empty cup (obtainable during the quest)
bowl of hot water (obtainable during the quest)

5 pigeon cages (obtainable during the quest)
note: the pigeons do not need to be let out of the cages.
note: the pigeons do not need to be let out of the cages.

two of each of the following gems, cut or uncut: (two of each uncut gem are obtained during the quest)
opal
jade
red topaz
sapphire

name: Mountain Daughter
required_items: staff or a pole (obtainable during the quest, dramen staff does not work, but elemental staves do work)
gloves (excluding: slayer, mystic, ranger, moonclan, lunar, vambraces, and random event apparel)

name: Between a Rock...
required_items: an ammo mould (can be bought for 5 coins during the quest) or a double ammo mould

name: The Feud
required_items: gloves (not all work, but leather gloves and graceful gloves do, as well as many others. barrows gloves, ice gloves, vambraces and slayer gloves do not work!)
kharidian headpiece (can be bought from ali morrisane)
fake beard (can be bought from ali morrisane)
3 beers (can be obtained during quest, bought from ali the barman for 2 coins each)

bucket (can be obtained during quest, spawns at the location it is needed – bring three extra buckets if you plan on doing my arm's big adventure as three ugthanki dung is needed for that quest). one more might be needed for forgettable tale... (1/25 chance for each player).

name: The Golem
required_items: papyrus (can be bought from ali morrisane for 10gp)
4 soft clay (or a bracelet of clay and a pickaxe to mine north-west of the ruins)
phoenix feather (can be obtained north-west of the ruins)
means to enter the desert (such as the shantay pass, teleport tablets or scrolls, fairy rings or the pharaoh's sceptre)

name: Desert Treasure I
required_items: 10+ shantay passes or a way to enter the kharidian desert without one
garlic powder (made by grinding garlic in a pestle and mortar)
spice (gnome spice and evil dave's spices will not work)
a sweet (cake, chocolate cake (part cakes are accepted), or chocolate bar)
spiked boots (obtainable during the quest by bringing dunstan climbing boots and an iron bar; do so before attempting to obtain the ice diamond)
climbing boots (if eadgar's ruse isn't completed and/or you lack 61 magic for the trollheim teleport)
a facemask, slayer helmet, or gas mask

name: Icthlarin's Little Helper
required_items: regular or overgrown cat, hellcat or kitten. no food is required as the kitten can stay in your inventory for the most part, or automatically go in/out of your inventory.
bag of salt (can be bought from any slayer master, other players, or the grand exchange) or an empty bucket to obtain a pile of salt in sophanem
bucket of sap (use a knife on an evergreen tree or a regular tree with the description "a commonly found tree" with a bucket in your inventory)
full waterskin to give away (can be bought for 30 coins at shantay pass)
linen (can be bought on the grand exchange or bought from raetul in sophanem for 30 coins during the quest)
means to enter the desert. (such as the shantay pass, teleport tablets or scrolls, fairy rings or the pharaoh's sceptre)

name: Tears of Guthix
required_items:
lit sapphire lantern (use a cut sapphire on a bullseye lantern or on a bullseye lantern (unf)), make sure to use a tinderbox on it as juna is busy
swamp tar to fill an empty sapphire lantern using the chemist in rimmington or the lamp still in dorgesh-kaan
swamp tar to fill an empty sapphire lantern using the chemist in rimmington or the lamp still in dorgesh-kaan
rope (if you have not yet entered the lumbridge swamp caves)

name: Zogre Flesh Eaters
required_items: 5 free inventory spaces are needed to receive items near the start of the quest

a comp ogre bow (not needed if using crumble undead in final battle) or:
wolf bones
achey logs (obtainable during quest)
knife (obtainable during quest)
axe of your woodcutting level
bow string

brutal arrows (not needed if using crumble undead in final battle) or:
achey logs
knife (obtainable during quest)
nails of your smithing level
hammer
feathers (4 per 1 brutal arrow)

name: The Lost Tribe
required_items: light source (note: candles, torches and oil lamps can cause swamp gas explosions if going off-route, and need a tinderbox to stay lit)

name: The Giant Dwarf
required_items: means to cast telekinetic grab (air and law rune)
logs (most logs will work, however, arctic pine, redwood & coloured logs do not work)
coal (obtainable during the quest with 30 mining)
various ores and bars (mostly obtainable during the quest, see below)
redberry pie (unless you have previously given thurgo a pie for free -- outside the the knight's sword quest)

name: Mourning's End Part I
required_items: each of these dyes: red, yellow, green, and blue (can be bought during the quest for 6 coins each)
rotten apple (must be the rotten apple on the ground north of the mourner headquarters in west ardougne, obtainable during the quest)
toad crunchies or premade t'd crunch
barrel of naphtha, or 6-9 coal to make one
7 empty inventory spaces for the mourner gear

name: Forgettable Tale...
required_items: 2 barley malt (no range in keldagrim, plain barley has to be cooked elsewhere)
seed dibber (no tool leprechaun in keldagrim)
ale yeast (or a pot (obtainable during the quest) + 25 coins)
2 beers (purchasable during quest for 1-2 coins each)
a random item from the list below (see list for details)

name: Garden of Tranquillity
required_items:
all tool leprechaun tools
a rake
a seed dibber
a spade
secateurs (magic secateurs work)
a watering can
a gardening trowel
3+ cabbage seeds (6 recommended to plant in both allotments to increase chance of survival)
3+ onion seeds (6 recommended to plant in both allotments to increase chance of survival)
2 ultracompost/supercompost/compost (note: bottomless compost bucket will not work for these two required composts. the quality of these 2 composts do not matter.)

name: A Tail of Two Cats
required_items: cat or kitten (hellcats work. be sure to bring fish for your kitten if you're using one.)
desert shirt (obtainable during quest) or druid's robe top (the desert outfit does not work)
desert robe (obtainable during quest) or druid's robe (the desert outfit does not work)

name: Wanted!
required_items:
10,000 coins, or:
law rune
enchanted gem (bought from a slayer master)
molten glass
enchanted gem (bought from a slayer master)

20 un-noted rune essence or pure essence (you'll get them back)
the player must deliver all 20 rune essence at once
the player must deliver all 20 rune essence at once
light source (note: candles, torches and oil lamps can cause swamp gas explosions if going off-route, and need a tinderbox to stay lit)

name: Mourning's End Part II
required_items: a chisel (one can be found in the house south of the mourner hq)
a death talisman/tiara for regular players and ironmen with 90+ slayer, or else 50 junk items (for other ironmen). a catalytic talisman/tiara may also be used.

name: Rum Deal
required_items: at least 47 prayer points for the evil spirits part of the quest

name: Shadow of the Storm
required_items:
any black outfit (minimum of 3 pieces, see below for the allowed gear — the dyed silverlight does not count as a piece of black clothing)
note: you can make a black desert robe and shirt during the quest if you brought a desert robe and shirt
note: you can make a black desert robe and shirt during the quest if you brought a desert robe and shirt
black dye (from grinding a black mushroom using a pestle and mortar alongside a vial)
means to enter the desert (such as the shantay pass, desert amulet 2, teleport tablets or scrolls, fairy rings or the pharaoh's sceptre)

name: Making History
required_items: ghostspeak amulet or morytania legs 2 or higher

a way to enter port phasmatys
completion of ghosts ahoy or
2 ecto-token or
1 bone, 1 pot and 1 bucket to earn 5 ecto-tokens (you still only need two) or
4,100 gold for a charter ship to port phasmatys (cheaper depending upon where you travel from and if you use ring of charos).
1 bone, 1 pot and 1 bucket to earn 5 ecto-tokens (you still only need two) or
4,100 gold for a charter ship to port phasmatys (cheaper depending upon where you travel from and if you use ring of charos).

name: Ratcatchers
required_items: any type of cat or hellcat (for most of the quest, a cat with a high successful rat catch rate is recommended, and overgrown cats cannot be used there -- during the hooknosed jack part of the quest, any cat with strong combat stats is recommended)

rat poison (if cheese is not already poisoned; can be found in the clock tower basement), or made during the quest with the following items:
empty vial
cleaned kwuarm (grimy will not work; zahur in nardah cleans grimy herbs for 200 coins)
red spiders' eggs
cleaned kwuarm (grimy will not work; zahur in nardah cleans grimy herbs for 200 coins)
catspeak amulet (unless dragon slayer ii is completed)
pot of weeds (use an empty pot with weeds)
101 coins (or 51 coins with a ring of charos (a))

name: Spirits of the Elid
required_items: runes for telekinetic grab (one law and air runes)
pickaxe (can be obtained during the quest)
bow and arrows (can be obtained during the quest); a crystal bow will also work

name: Devious Minds
required_items: a non-degraded large or colossal pouch

name: The Hand in the Sand
required_items: redberries (purchasable during the quest from the food store in port sarim)
5 earth runes (can be bought from betty for 20 gp)
bucket of sand (obtainable during quest if you bring a bucket)

name: Enakhra's Lament
required_items: one of the following: bread, any kind of pie, any kind of cake, any kind of pizza, or a baked potato with topping (partial pies, cakes and pizzas do not work)
candle (a black candle will not work)
pickaxe (unless you already have the required items)
soft clay (obtainable during quest if you bring a pickaxe and bucket or jug of water)
coal (obtainable during quest with level 30 mining(boostable))
52 kg of sandstone (obtainable during quest with level 35 mining (boostable))
two 5 kg pieces of granite (obtainable during quest with level 45 mining (boostable))
runes to cast fire bolt, fire blast or fire wave
runes to cast wind bolt, wind blast or wind wave
runes to cast crumble undead (multiple casts recommended in case of splashing)
enough remaining prayer points to cast protect from melee for about five seconds

name: Fairytale I - Growing Pains
required_items: secateurs (obtainable in sarah's farming shop north-west of the quest start for 5 coins)
a combination of three items picked for you at random, see list of potential items.

name: Recipe for Disaster
required_items: any fruit blast excluding a premade fr' blast
about 320 coins (or 120 if you have the activated ring of charos)
bowl of water (an empty bowl can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
bucket of water (an empty bucket can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
3 buckets of milk (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
2 eggs (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
any dye except red, yellow, or orange
spice or gnome spice (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
cake tin (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
any cat except an overgrown cat (you'll be chasing rats, so a wily cat is recommended)
several bowls of stew (9 at most)
raw chompy (several recommended in case of burning)
ogre bow and several ogre arrows (10 is enough)
2 pots of flour (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
pot of cornflour (or raw sweetcorn and an empty pot)
pot of cream (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
gorilla, ninja and zombie greegree (or 3000 coins and combat equipment if making the greegrees during the quest)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Another Cook's Quest
required_items: any fruit blast excluding a premade fr' blast

name: Recipe for Disaster/Defeating the Culinaromancer
required_items: menaphite remedy or restore potions since karamel will lower your stats
certain armour and weapons for each boss
good healing food, such as sharks

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf
required_items: about 320 coins (or 120 if you have the activated ring of charos)
bucket of milk (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
pot of flour (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
egg (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
bowl of water (a bowl and sink can be found in the kitchen of lumbridge castle)
4 asgarnian ales (can be bought during the quest at the rising sun inn in falador)
gloves, if not using gloves make sure to bring telekinetic grab spell runes (ice gloves are the best, but other gloves will work fine too)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Goblin generals
required_items:
orange slices
use a knife on an orange
use a knife on an orange
either blue, green or purple dye (purple dye spawns directly east of the spirit tree at the khazard battlefield, south of the ardougne castle)
spice or gnome spice (can be bought or stolen from the ardougne market, bought from the culinaromancer's chest or bought in the tree gnome stronghold)
charcoal or ground charcoal (buy in shilo village or jiminua's jungle store.)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Pirate Pete
required_items: a raw cod (it's highly recommended to get at least 3 of all the ingredients, as the fishcake can burn)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Lumbridge Guide
required_items: grouping teleport to guardians of the rift minigame
necklace of passage or access to fairy rings (dis) and a lunar/dramen staff (for quick transportation to wizards' tower)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Evil Dave
required_items: any cat except an overgrown cat (note that each cat has a different effective rat catch rate -- kittens or lazy cats are not recommended)
several bowls of stew (9 at most)

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing King Awowogei
required_items: karamjan monkey greegree (unless you already have another greegree)
gorilla, ninja monkey and zombie monkey greegree (can be obtained during the quest with a monkey talisman each)
banana (can be obtained during the quest)
monkey nuts or around 10 coins to buy some.

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze
required_items: bucket of milk (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
pot of cream (can be bought from the culinaromancer's chest)
any axe (not required if you have a vanilla pod -- the blessed axe will not work!)
any machete (as well as radimus notes if you haven't completed legends' quest) (not required if you have a vanilla pod)
dramen staff or lunar staff to enter zanaris

name: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Skrach Uglogwee
required_items: axe (a blessed axe will not work)
raw chompy (bring several if you have a low cooking level)
iron spit (made on an anvil with an iron bar)
logs (can be obtained during the quest)
ogre bellows (can be obtained during the quest)
ogre bow or comp ogre bow with ogre arrows (ogre bow can be purchased from rantz during the quest for at most 600 coins)

name: In Aid of the Myreque
required_items:
a silver weapon to damage vampyres, which includes:
a blessed silver sickle (obtained during nature spirit)
a normal silver sickle
a blessed axe (obtained during animal magnetism)
a wolfbane dagger (obtained during priest in peril, which is a prerequisite for this quest)
silver-, dark-, or arclight
any weapon whilst wearing an efaritay's aid
a blessed silver sickle (obtained during nature spirit)
a blessed axe (obtained during animal magnetism)
a wolfbane dagger (obtained during priest in peril, which is a prerequisite for this quest)
any weapon whilst wearing an efaritay's aid
44 nails (42 are obtainable during the quest)
10 raw mackerel or 10 raw snail meats (depending on what is asked)

on the standard spellbook for lvl-1 enchant:
a cosmic rune
a water rune

optional to give to ivan strom (strongly recommended if you don't have a high combat level 85+):
a steel med helm
a steel chainbody
steel platelegs
a silver sickle
15 cooked salmon, snails, slimy eels, or stew
15 cooked salmon, snails, slimy eels, or stew

name: Rag and Bone Man I
required_items: 8 coins for 8 pots of vinegar (bring 68 coins if walking to and from karamja for boat fare)
8 logs of any type (or an axe to obtain them)
light source (a lantern is highly preferred)

name: Swan Song
required_items:
an airtight pot – created by using a pot lid on a pot
a pot, or
a soft clay if making your own pot during quest, or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest
a pot lid, or
a soft clay if making your own pot lid during quest (note: 2 soft clay needed if making both pot and pot lid), or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest

a pot, or
a soft clay if making your own pot during quest, or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest

a soft clay if making your own pot during quest, or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest

a pot lid, or
a soft clay if making your own pot lid during quest (note: 2 soft clay needed if making both pot and pot lid), or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest

a soft clay if making your own pot lid during quest (note: 2 soft clay needed if making both pot and pot lid), or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own clay during quest

5 iron bars, or
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own iron during quest
a pickaxe (obtainable during the quest) if mining your own iron during quest

1 set of logs of any kind, or
an axe (obtainable during quest) if chopping your own logs during quest
an axe (obtainable during quest) if chopping your own logs during quest
a small fishing net (given to you during the quest if you do not have one)
a brown apron (given to you during the quest if you do not have one)

name: Royal Trouble
required_items: 5 coal (obtainable during the quest with a pickaxe, which will also be obtainable)
2 rope (obtainable from crates during the quest)

name: Death to the Dorgeshuun
required_items: any light source (lanterns are recommended - open light sources such as a candle can cause gas explosions and require a tinderbox)
2 full sets of h.a.m. robes (all 7 pieces) (chance to receive robes is significantly higher during the quest)[1]
pickaxe (if not using a games necklace to teleport to tears of guthix (minigame))

name: Lunar Diplomacy
required_items: a guam leaf (potential drop from a suqah during the quest)
a marrentill (potential drop from a suqah during the quest)
two spools of thread (obtainable during quest)
any axe (bronze axe obtainable during quest)
a bullseye lantern (not (unf) nor (empty). if you cannot obtain one, bring means to get to a lamp oil still instead. swamp tar can be obtained during the quest.)
all elemental talismans or their respective tiaras (air, water, earth and fire, or an elemental talisman), or access to the abyss, or the guardians of the rift minigame
runes for the final boss fight as lunar equipment must be worn (elemental staves not equipable)

name: The Eyes of Glouphrie
required_items: bucket of sap or a knife and an empty bucket

name: Darkness of Hallowvale
required_items: knife (obtainable during the quest) or a sickle
means to cast telekinetic grab (air and law rune -- both obtainable during the quest)

name: The Slug Menace
required_items: commorb (can get another by speaking to sir tiffy)
dead sea slug (obtainable during the quest)
at least 5 rune/pure essence (bring 15–20 in case they shatter; succeeding with 5 is very unlikely)

access to the air, water, earth, fire and mind altars
elemental talisman or air, water, earth and fire talismans or tiaras
mind talisman or tiara
or
travelling through the abyss or using a runecraft cape
or
access to guardians of the rift
elemental talisman or air, water, earth and fire talismans or tiaras
travelling through the abyss or using a runecraft cape
access to guardians of the rift

name: Elemental Workshop II
required_items: pickaxe (if obtaining elemental ore during quest)

2 elemental metals (3 elemental metals if you wish to smith the mind shield), or:
2 elemental ore (obtainable during quest) (3 if you wish to smith the mind shield)
8 coal (12 if you wish to smith the mind shield)
2 elemental ore (obtainable during quest) (3 if you wish to smith the mind shield)
8 coal (12 if you wish to smith the mind shield)
the battered key from elemental workshop i

name: My Arm's Big Adventure
required_items: bucket (can be obtained during the quest, south of the cooking pot on death plateau)

3 ugthanki dung, or the following materials to gather it:
red hot sauce (obtainable in pollnivneach) or the camulet (from enakhra's lament quest)
spade
3 additional buckets
red hot sauce (obtainable in pollnivneach) or the camulet (from enakhra's lament quest)

several farming supplies, which can be stored by any tool leprechaun and withdrawn from the trollheim tool leprechaun - except for supercompost, these may also be purchased from this leprechaun:
7 supercompost (must be supercompost, one extra can be used later rather than the plant cure so 8 total)
spade
rake
seed dibber
plant cure
7 supercompost (must be supercompost, one extra can be used later rather than the plant cure so 8 total)

name: Enlightened Journey
required_items: a full sack of potatoes (item is called potatoes(10)) (there are potatoes growing in entrana in the house east of auguste, bring another empty sack if picking here)
8 empty sacks – bring 9 sacks if planning to fill one with potatoes on entrana.
1 unlit candle or black candle (can be obtained during quest by stealing candles in entrana church)

12 unnoted willow branches (buy from the grand exchange, or plant a willow sapling and wait 5 hours.)
note: a willow seed is not required, nor is a basket of apples as payment (although planting one beforehand is faster); all players receive a willow sapling and a basket of apples to pay to protect the tree from auguste during the quest.
secateurs (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)
a rake (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)
a spade (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)

note: a willow seed is not required, nor is a basket of apples as payment (although planting one beforehand is faster); all players receive a willow sapling and a basket of apples to pay to protect the tree from auguste during the quest.
secateurs (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)
a rake (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)
a spade (only if planting the tree) (can also be exchanged from a tool leprechaun if placed there before)

name: Animal Magnetism
required_items: mithril axe (required to obtain the blessed axe, no other type of axe will do)
ghostspeak amulet (morytania legs will not work)
20 ecto-tokens (or 4 bones, 4 buckets and 4 pots to gain the tokens)

name: Contact!
required_items: a light source (kandarin headgear, firemaking cape, abyssal lantern or a bruma torch are extremely recommended as they can't be extinguished by traps in the dungeon). if you don't have one, the sophanem guard under the temple of the lesser deities will sell you an unlit torch for 200 coins.
a tinderbox (unless you have the kandarin headgear, firemaking cape, abyssal lantern or a bruma torch). if you don't have one, the sophanem guard will sell you one for 50 coins.

name: Cold War
required_items: clockwork or a steel bar to make one
raw cod or the ring of charos (a)

name: The Fremennik Isles
required_items: a raw tuna (obtainable during quest, with 35 fishing or bought from the shop)

either 8 tin ores, 7 pieces of coal, or 6 mithril ores (depends on your mining level; levels 1-9 will require tin ore, 10-54 will require coal, and 55-99 require mithril ore). note: the ores can be noted.
if the neitiznot shield is already purchased, only 8 ropes are required.
8 split logs (obtainable during the quest with 56 woodcutting and an axe)
a neitiznot shield (or 56 woodcutting, a hammer and a bronze nail)
yak-hide armour top and legs (or 46 crafting, a needle and two thread)

name: Tower of Life
required_items: beer (must be a regular beer - other beers do not work.)

name: The Great Brain Robbery
required_items: diving apparatus (obtain these from murphy in port khazard if you've lost them; talk to him 2 times, 1st time for helmet and 2nd time for apparatus.)

10 wooden cats – you must progress far enough in the quest to make these yourself, or buy them from the grand exchange at any time
4 oak planks and a saw (if you are providing your own crafting table and do not already have one; build in the clockmaking space of the workshop)
10 planks (if making your own wooden cats)
10 pieces of fur: fur, bear fur or grey wolf fur (if making your own wooden cats) (wolf fur can be obtained during quest by killing canifis townsfolk. baraek sells them for 20 gold each. furs from hunter monsters will not work)
4 oak planks and a saw (if you are providing your own crafting table and do not already have one; build in the clockmaking space of the workshop)
10 planks (if making your own wooden cats)

10 pieces of fur: fur, bear fur or grey wolf fur (if making your own wooden cats) (wolf fur can be obtained during quest by killing canifis townsfolk. baraek sells them for 20 gold each. furs from hunter monsters will not work)
a hammer (note: imcando hammer does not work)
about 100 nails (38 are needed, but some—especially bronze or iron—may bend)
8 normal planks (18 if making the wooden cats instead of buying them from the grand exchange)
ring of charos (if lost, can be re-obtained during quest by pickpocketing fenkenstrain)

name: What Lies Below
required_items: access to the chaos altar (chaos talisman or tiara, or travelling through the abyss or temple of the eye) (catalytic talisman and catalytic tiara will not work)

name: Olaf's Quest
required_items: 6 ropes (can be obtained during the quest)
4 free inventory slots (10 if not bringing your own ropes)

name: Another Slice of H.A.M.
required_items: magic or ranged gear for enemy fight (cannot use melee on them)

name: Dream Mentor
required_items: 3 different kinds of food: 6 of 1 type and 7 of 2 others for a total of 20 pieces (sacks of cabbages, potatoes, and onions can be used as they each contain 10 piece of their respective food and only require a total of 3 inventory slots)
a good weapon (trident of the seas recommended because they have no magic defence), good armour, good food such as sharks, and super potion sets.

name: Grim Tales
required_items: 2 tarromin potion (unf) or 2 vials of water and 2 tarromins
watering can with at least 1 dose (can also be stored with the leprechaun)
good armour and a weapon (ranged or magic equipment recommended if you have low melee levels)

name: King's Ransom
required_items: telekinetic grab runes (1 air rune and 1 law rune) (can be obtained during the quest)
full black armour (black full helm, platebody, and platelegs/plateskirt)—note: trimmed versions of black armour will work. (h) versions will not work
a bronze med helm (can be purchased from peksa's helmet shop. in the barbarian village, or picked up inside draynor manor near the exit)

an iron chainbody (both the iron chainbody and the bronze med helm can be bought upstairs in the warrior guild armoury. if you can't access the warriors' guild you can get an iron chainbody from wayne's chains in southern falador, horvik's armour shop in central varrock, or the grand exchange)
animate rock scroll (obtainable during the quest). note: if you have it in your bank, either destroy it or take it with you. you won't be able to receive another from wizard cromperty otherwise.

name: Monkey Madness II
required_items: a pickaxe (if you choose the tanking route)
a ninja monkey greegree (small or medium)
a slash weapon (to slash webs if you choose the tanking route - wilderness sword of any tier recommended for this due to 100% web slash ability).
the translation book from the grand tree. if you have lost it a replacement can be obtained from king narnode during the quest.

name: Client of Kourend
required_items: feather (a stripy or coloured feather can also be used, but a magic gold feather cannot)

name: Rag and Bone Man II
required_items: 27 jugs of vinegar (bought from fortunato for 27 coins)
27 sets of logs (any logs - normal logs can be obtained on the path just below the odd old man's hut if you bring an axe).
combat gear to kill zogres (an ogre composite bow with brutal arrows or runes for crumble undead casts is advised)
mirror shield or v's shield (unless using a workaround - see guide for how to get around using this)

name: The Queen of Thieves
required_items: stew (cooking ingredients can be obtained during quest for 6 coins. requires 25 cooking) or bought from forester's arms bartender in seer's village for 20gp.

name: Dragon Slayer II
required_items: at least 12 nails of any kind (note: bringing more is recommended; nails may bend!)
seal of passage (if elite fremennik diary is not done)
runes for 3 fire wave spells or 3 fire surge spells

name: Tale of the Righteous
required_items: a ranged weapon with ammunition. darts and throwing knives also work.
runes for 2-3 casts of any magic combat spell

name: A Taste of Hope
required_items: 1,000 coins (more if taking andras' boat from the ectofuntus, 10,000 each trip)

either:
3 air runes, 1 cosmic rune and having your magic set to the standard spellbook
an enchant emerald or jade tablet
3 air runes, 1 cosmic rune and having your magic set to the standard spellbook
an enchant emerald or jade tablet
rod of ivandis (can be obtained during the quest)
pestle and mortar (can be obtained during the quest)
vial of water (obtained during the quest)

name: Making Friends with My Arm
required_items: climbing boots (if not using trollheim teleports)

name: Song of the Elves
required_items: mourner gear including gas mask (plague jacket and trousers do not work)
flowers from mithril seeds or an irit leaf
wine of zamorak or zamorak brew(4)

name: The Fremennik Exiles
required_items: 2 kegs of beer (cannot be obtained in rellekka during quest, buy from thora the barkeep before starting the quest)
fishing rod or fly fishing rod

fremennik shield (this is not the tradeable neitiznot shield)
alternatively, get it from bardur after being exiled, for either 150,000 or for free using a ring of charos (a)
recommended: rune thrownaxes to get to bardur in the waterbirth island dungeon
alternatively, get it from bardur after being exiled, for either 150,000 or for free using a ring of charos (a)
recommended: rune thrownaxes to get to bardur in the waterbirth island dungeon
3 lunar bars or ores. alternatively a pickaxe to obtain them.
seal of passage (if the elite fremennik diaries aren't completed)

name: Sins of the Father
required_items: vyrewatch outfit (top, legs, and shoes) or 1,950 coins to purchase it from trader sven's black-market goods (can be obtained during quest)
runes for lvl-3 enchant (1 cosmic rune, 5 fire runes) or an enchant ruby or topaz tablet

name: A Porcine of Interest
required_items: knife or a slash weapon (except abyssal whip, abyssal tentacle, or dragon claws) (obtainable during the quest)

name: Getting Ahead
required_items: bear fur or grey wolf fur (a grizzly bear and bear cub spawn west of the farm and two black bears spawn east of the farm)
clay rocks are found in the kebos lowlands mine passed during the quest;
gordon's house has a water source and a bucket spawn;
there is a bronze pickaxe spawn at the mine, stuck in some rocks.
saw (obtainable in the shed north of the house)
2 normal planks (obtainable near the cave entrance)
at least 6 nails of any kind (iron nails can be found in the workbench north of the house, and more than 6 is recommended in case you bend a few)
knife (obtainable on the kitchen table in the house)
red dye (obtainable from the shelves in the house)
pot of flour (obtainable upstairs in the house)

name: A Night at the Theatre
required_items: ghostspeak amulet (morytania legs 2 or better also work)
any axe besides the blessed axe

name: A Kingdom Divided
required_items: normal spellbook, and runes to cast a fire spell (fire bolt or better)
melee or ranged equipment (weapons/armour/potions/food) to defeat a level 239 enemy
a defence potion (3 or more doses)
a dark essence block or a pickaxe and chisel (the latter is found at the mine) to obtain one

name: Land of the Goblins
required_items:
black dye (black mushroom obtainable during quest)
an empty vial and a pestle and mortar if making the black dye during the quest
an empty vial and a pestle and mortar if making the black dye during the quest

name: Beneath Cursed Sands
required_items: any cooked or raw meat (fish will not work; raw yak meat will not work; purchasable from shop during quest)

name: Sleeping Giants
required_items: 1 wool (ball of wool will not work)
hammer or imcando hammer (other types of hammers will not work)
1 bucket of water (obtainable during quest) or ice gloves

name: The Garden of Death
required_items: secateurs (obtainable during quest) (magic secateurs also work)

name: Secrets of the North
required_items: lockpick (strange old lockpick does not work)
